title: kimi-auth-url
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/kimi-auth-url 端点 — 调用 oauth_kimi:request_device_code 返回验证 URL

title: antigravity-auth-url
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/antigravity-auth-url 端点 — 启动 OAuth session 返回 auth URL

title: get-auth-status
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/get-auth-status 查询活跃 OAuth 会话状态

title: quota
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/quota 返回各凭证配额/冷却状态

title: usage-statistics-enabled
description: 添加 GET/PUT /v0/management/usage-statistics-enabled 开关

title: usage-queue
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/usage-queue 返回队列内容

title: request-error-logs
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/request-error-logs 列出错误日志文件

title: request-error-logs/:name
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/request-error-logs/:name 下载特定日志

title: request-log-by-id
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/request-log-by-id/:id 按 ID 查请求日志

title: DELETE /logs
description: 添加 DELETE /v0/management/logs 清除日志文件

title: auth-files/download
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/auth-files/download?id=X 下载凭证原始文件

title: auth-files/models
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/auth-files/models 列出各凭证对应的可用模型

title: model-definitions/:channel
description: 添加 GET /v0/management/model-definitions/:channel 按通道返回静态模型定义

title: oauth-excluded-models
description: 添加 GET/PUT /v0/management/oauth-excluded-models 管理 OAuth 排除模型列表

title: oauth-model-alias
description: 添加 GET/PUT /v0/management/oauth-model-alias 管理 OAuth 模型别名

title: api-call
description: 添加 POST /v0/management/api-call 使用指定凭据执行测试请求

title: ampcode/upstream-api-key
description: 添加 GET/PUT/DELETE ampcode/upstream-api-key 单 key 管理

title: ampcode/restrict-management-to-localhost
description: 添加 GET/PUT ampcode/restrict-management-to-localhost

title: Root / endpoint
description: 添加 GET / 返回可用 API 端点列表

title: /v1/messages
description: 添加 POST /v1/messages Claude Messages API 原生格式转发

title: /v1beta/models
description: 添加 GET /v1beta/models Gemini 原生模型列表

title: /v1beta/models/*action
description: 添加 POST /v1beta/models/:model:generateContent 等 Gemini 原生 action

title: Session Affinity 多 Key
description: 支持从 X-Session-ID / X-Client-Request-Id / metadata.user_id / conversation_id 提取 session key

title: disable-cooling 配置
description: 添加 disable_cooling 配置项跳过冷却调度

title: remote-management 细粒度
description: 添加 allow_remote / disable_control_panel 管理配置 + mgmt_auth 支持 allow_remote
